ScalarOperator.ScalarString: CASE WHEN DM_HADR_INTERNAL_AVAILABILITY_GROUP_STATES.[local_replica_role]=(1) THEN [Expr1057] ELSE NULL END

CASE WHEN DM_HADR_INTERNAL_AVAILABILITY_GROUP_STATES.[local_replica_role]=(1) AND [Expr1057]=(0) THEN N'ONLINE_IN_PROGRESS' ELSE CASE WHEN DM_HADR_INTERNAL_AVAILABILITY_GROUP_STATES.[local_replica_role]=(1) AND [Expr1057]>(0) THEN N'ONLINE' ELSE NULL END END
CASE WHEN DM_HADR_INTERNAL_AVAILABILITY_GROUP_STATES.[local_replica_role]=(2) THEN [Expr1057] ELSE NULL END

CASE WHEN DM_HADR_INTERNAL_AVAILABILITY_GROUP_STATES.[local_replica_role]=(2) AND [Expr1057]=(0) THEN N'ONLINE_IN_PROGRESS' ELSE CASE WHEN DM_HADR_INTERNAL_AVAILABILITY_GROUP_STATES.[local_replica_role]=(2) AND [Expr1057]>(0) THEN N'ONLINE' ELSE NULL END END

CASE WHEN [Expr1058] IS NULL THEN (0) ELSE CASE WHEN DM_HADR_INTERNAL_AVAILABILITY_GROUP_STATES.[local_replica_role]=(1) AND DM_HADR_INTERNAL_AVAILABILITY_GROUP_STATES.[configured_replica_count]>[Expr1056] THEN (0) ELSE [Expr1058] END END

CASE WHEN [Expr1058] IS NULL THEN N'NOT_HEALTHY' ELSE CASE WHEN DM_HADR_INTERNAL_AVAILABILITY_GROUP_STATES.[local_replica_role]=(1) AND DM_HADR_INTERNAL_AVAILABILITY_GROUP_STATES.[configured_replica_count]>[Expr1056] THEN N'NOT_HEALTHY' ELSE CASE WHEN [Expr1058]=(2) THEN N'HEALTHY' ELSE CASE WHEN [Expr1058]=(1) THEN N'PARTIALLY_HEALTHY' ELSE N'NOT_HEALTHY' END END END END

MAX(CASE WHEN [Union1017] IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CASE WHEN DM_HADR_INTERNAL_AVAILABILITY_REPLICA_STATES.[configured_database_count]>[Union1015] THEN (0) ELSE CASE WHEN [Union1017]=(0) THEN (1) ELSE (0) END END END)

MIN(CASE WHEN [Expr1019]=(4) AND DM_HADR_INTERNAL_AVAILABILITY_REPLICA_STATES.[connected_state]=(1) THEN (2) ELSE CASE WHEN [Union1016] IS NULL AND [Expr1037] IS NULL THEN (0) ELSE CASE WHEN DM_HADR_INTERNAL_AVAILABILITY_REPLICA_STATES.[is_internal]=(1) AND [Union1015]=(0) THEN (0) ELSE CASE WHEN [Expr1036] IS NOT NULL AND DM_HADR_INTERNAL_AVAILABILITY_REPLICA_STATES.[configured_database_count]>[Expr1036] THEN (0) ELSE CASE WHEN [Expr1037] IS NOT NULL THEN [Expr1037] ELSE CASE WHEN DM_HADR_INTERNAL_AVAILABILITY_REPLICA_STATES.[is_internal]=(0) AND DM_HADR_INTERNAL_AVAILABILITY_REPLICA_STATES.[configured_database_count]>[Union1015] THEN (0) ELSE CASE WHEN DM_HADR_INTERNAL_AVAILABILITY_REPLICA_STATES.[is_internal]=(1) AND DM_HADR_INTERNAL_AVAILABILITY_REPLICA_STATES.[is_local]=(1) AND [Expr1046] IS NOT NULL THEN [Expr1046] ELSE [Union1016] END END END END END END END)
CASE WHEN [master].[sys].[sysguidrefs].[guid] as [sgr2].[guid] IS NULL THEN DM_HADR_INTERNAL_WSFC_AG_REPLICAS.[ag_replica_id] ELSE [master].[sys].[sysguidrefs].[guid] as [sgr2].[guid] END
